normalized_problem.title: Patch deployment failed on payment remediation queue
normalized_problem.description: The latest remediation patch did not complete. The deployment job failed after the queue worker health check reported repeated processing timeouts.
evidence_summary: Deployment job run 2026-05-24.67 failed at health-check step.
Queue worker reported timeout while processing remediation messages.
No successful completion marker was written after the patch attempt.

recommended_next_step: Open a remediation incident for deployment_or_release, attach the supplied evidence, and request missing information: impact, first_observed_at, reproduction_steps, owner_or_contact, recent_change_reference.
operator_note: Structured locally by remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1; no external APIs were called.
